title: Trichomanes agasthianum
intro: Trichomanes agasthianum, also known as Agasthyam plant, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Trichomanes agasthianum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are decoctions, infusions, and topical ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions and relieve pain and inflammation.
